about.label: About
about.heading: Hi, I'm Szilveszter!
about.intro: I have been working in web development for over a year, focusing on modern technologies proven in enterprise environments. I work with systems used by companies such as Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest, and even administration platforms used by NASA.
about.introStrong: In practice, this means your website will not be a template-based, sluggish system, but a lightning-fast, secure, future-proof platform that also loads instantly on mobile.

custom.title: Custom
custom.text: Not a template, but a solution tailored to you.

accordion.title: What do you get from working with me?

items.title: What does a great website really do?
items.content: A great website is not just a digital business card and it is not only about looking nice. A professional site brings real clients, pre-qualifies leads for you, presents your references, and keeps your business available 24/7 without your phone having to ring all day. It automates your processes and builds trust in future clients before you even speak in person.

items.title: How am I different from template solutions?
items.content: While many websites on the market are built on heavy, stacked WordPress templates and unstable plugins, I work with fully custom code. For you, this means full design freedom, maximum data security, and outstanding load speed that Google rewards with better rankings.

items.title: Easy admin interface - hard to break
items.content: Forget overcomplicated and confusing dashboards. You get a clean admin interface tailored to you and your business, where you can edit text, upload new images, or update pricing in seconds, even from your phone. I structure it so the visual layout cannot be accidentally broken.

items.title: Visibility and Google rankings (Technical SEO)
items.content: Even the best website is useless if potential clients cannot find it. From the very first line of code, I focus heavily on SEO. Thanks to precise technical setup, custom metadata, and modern structure, your site starts with a technical advantage over local competitors.

items.title: Full-service delivery from planning to launch
items.content: I do not disappear after coding is done. Our collaboration covers the full process: concept planning, modern UI/UX design, high-performance development, optimized content setup, secure hosting and domain support, and connecting your site to Google services.

cards.title: Agile and transparent workflow
cards.content: I work with an agile mindset where continuous and honest communication is key. You always see where things stand, and the final result matches your expectations.

cards.title: Built for local businesses
cards.content: SynelWeb builds websites that are clear, fast, and easy to use. My goal is to make your website genuinely useful in day-to-day operations and easy for visitors to navigate.

cards.title: Strong local market insight
cards.content: A large part of my work happens in and around Sopron, so I understand local business needs. The resulting websites perform reliably on mobile and provide a strong long-term foundation.

cards.title: Personal and online support
cards.content: During development I am available both in person and online. The goal is a website that is not overcomplicated or overexplained, but simply works effectively.

cta.title: Let's kick off your business's digital growth!
cta.text: Let's level up and outrun your competitors with a website your visitors and Google will love. We can discuss your goals in person in Sopron or in an online session.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Write or call, and let's also meet in person in Sopron.
contact.intro: If you want a fast, SEO-friendly and reliable website, you can reach me here easily. I reply by email, call back on the phone, and we can also meet in person around Sopron.
contact.introStrong: My core belief is that you can build a powerful, fast, and reliable website together with standout design and rich media. While many in the market claim you cannot have both, I deliver the maximum without compromise.
contact.responseText: I usually reply within 1 business day.
contact.callCardText: Direct phone consultation with a fast callback.
contact.emailCardText: Send the details and I will reply with the next clear step.
contact.mapText: See where I work or plan an in-person meeting in just a few clicks.
contact.mapLocationText: If you prefer an in-person consultation, this map helps you quickly identify the location.
contact.facebookCardText: Follow on Facebook for fresh projects, practical tips, and current web updates.
contact.linkedinCardText: Professional profile, references, and direct contact in one place.
contact.closingTitle: Got an idea? Let's talk it through.
contact.closingText: Right after the first message, you'll get a clearer picture of what your project could look like, how much time it may take, and which solution fits your goals best.

technology.label: Technology and quality
technology.heading: I build premium quality under the hood too.
technology.intro: Many people can create visually attractive websites, but the technical foundation often stays weak, slow, and hard to maintain. Here, the polished surface is backed by a stable system built for real business use.
technology.introStrong: I strongly believe outstanding design and premium engineering should always go hand in hand. I do not build from templates, but from modern technologies that create a fast, secure, and future-ready digital presence.
technology.beliefTitle: No-compromise design and engineering working together.
technology.beliefText: The goal is not just a beautiful website, but a system that loads quickly, scales cleanly, stays secure, and remains dependable for years. That is what turns a website into a real business asset.
technology.stackTitle: I do not rely on templates. I build with top-tier technologies.
technology.stackIntro: The technologies below ensure your website does not only look modern, but also delivers maximum value from both a technical and business perspective.

cards.name: React
cards.title: A lightning-fast and fluid user experience
cards.summary: React is the world's most popular modern UI technology, updating content instantly and app-like without disruptive full page reloads.
cards.valueLabel: What does this mean for your business?
cards.valueText: Your website feels faster and more premium to use, visitors are less likely to drop off while waiting, and they are more likely to stay engaged and reach out.

cards.name: TailwindCSS
cards.title: No-compromise custom design and speed
cards.summary: TailwindCSS makes it possible to craft a fully custom, pixel-precise and modern visual identity without dragging along heavy styling systems that slow the site down.
cards.valueLabel: What does this mean for your business?
cards.valueText: You get a visual style tailored to your business together with lightning-fast loading. No unnecessary code bloat, just a clean, lightweight and premium experience that both Google and visitors appreciate.

cards.name: TypeScript
cards.title: Rock-solid and intelligent code
cards.summary: TypeScript sits in the elite tier of modern web development: it catches hidden issues during development and leads to a clean, maintainable codebase.
cards.valueLabel: What does this mean for your business?
cards.valueText: Your site becomes more stable, easier to expand, and far less likely to fail unexpectedly, while giving your business a technical foundation that can grow with it.

cards.name: Python
cards.title: A future-ready and intelligent engine
cards.summary: Python is one of the world's most versatile programming languages, trusted by major technology platforms and modern AI systems alike.
cards.valueLabel: What does this mean for your business?
cards.valueText: You get a powerful backend with clean logic, ready for more complex business workflows, automations, and future expansion without unnecessary friction.

cards.name: Django Framework
cards.title: A hardened digital fortress
cards.summary: Django is a premium framework designed for secure, fast, and scalable server-side applications with battle-tested protections built in.
cards.valueLabel: What does this mean for your business?
cards.valueText: Your data and your clients' data stay strongly protected, while background processes run quickly, reliably, and almost invisibly to the end user.

cards.name: PostgreSQL
cards.title: An intelligent and precise database
cards.summary: PostgreSQL is one of the world's most advanced open-source databases, built to stay fast and accurate even under serious load.
cards.valueLabel: What does this mean for your business?
cards.valueText: Whether your site handles products, bookings, messages, or user data, it will continue serving visitors quickly and reliably even during heavier traffic.

technology.llmLabel: Why does this matter for AI-driven search?
technology.llmTitle: Algorithms can recognize technical quality too.
technology.llmText: When future clients ask AI systems for provider recommendations, those systems will evaluate not only the content, but also the technical quality behind a website. A modern, clean, and professional structure helps position you as a reliable expert at the front of the field.

trustedCompanies.label: World-class technology foundations
trustedCompanies.title: Technologies trusted by global leaders
trustedCompanies.intro: When you choose to work with me, you are not getting experimental one-off solutions. You get the same technology foundations that power some of the world's most heavily used and most secure systems.

items.react: <brandNetflix>Netflix</brandNetflix> / <brandInstagram>Instagram</brandInstagram>: <brandNetflixPlain>Netflix</brandNetflixPlain> uses this foundation to keep its interface equally fast and seamless across TVs, phones, and laptops. <brandInstagramPlain>Instagram</brandInstagramPlain> relies on the same approach to serve hundreds of millions of scrolling users every day.
items.tailwind: <brandOpenAI>OpenAI</brandOpenAI> (<brandChatGPT>ChatGPT</brandChatGPT>): Even the pioneer of modern AI, <brandOpenAIPlain>OpenAI</brandOpenAIPlain>, chose this approach to shape the clean, modern, and remarkably fast interface behind <brandChatGPTPlain>ChatGPT</brandChatGPTPlain>.
items.backend: <brandNASA>NASA</brandNASA> / <brandSpotify>Spotify</brandSpotify> / <brandInstagram>Instagram</brandInstagram>: <brandNASAPlain>NASA</brandNASAPlain> favors this backend foundation for internal admin tools and data handling because of its exceptional security. <brandSpotifyPlain>Spotify</brandSpotifyPlain> and <brandInstagramPlain>Instagram</brandInstagramPlain> also depend on the same foundation to handle massive data throughput every second.
items.database: <brandApple>Apple</brandApple> / <brandUber>Uber</brandUber>: Global technology leaders such as <brandApplePlain>Apple</brandApplePlain> and <brandUberPlain>Uber</brandUberPlain> trust its engineering precision and stability with some of their most critical data.

trustedCompanies.valueTitle: What does this mean for your business?
trustedCompanies.valueText: It means your website is not standing on top of a cheap or unstable foundation, but on a world-class, high-tech digital engine. It is built to stay stable when traffic spikes and to protect your business data at the highest level.

cta.title: Let's build a website that feels premium inside and out.
cta.text: If design, performance, and long-term reliability all matter to you at once, then the technical foundation deserves the same level of attention as the visual layer.
